posts.author: richard.muir (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Basic project - even set the dependant on column to no action
3 tasks only - all have a timeline

get the generic error - so asked the AI - it was able to set…

Great I thought - until after the 5th one it set it started saying - it didn’t have the rights to set dependancies.

Infuriating
